tier_legend.R: true animation (Runway/SVD) — key beats only, <=10% total
tier_legend.M: moving still (Ken Burns / 2.5D parallax / drifting light) — default
tier_legend.K: motion graphics (numbers / timeline / code / quote cards)

image_pipeline: MJ heroes (H1-H28) lock brand sref -> SDXL (RealVisXL/JuggernautXL, max quality) mass-produces coverage -> R-ESRGAN -> 1080p; all people anonymous silhouettes (R2).
animation_estimate: ~13-15 animated shots of ~170 = ~8-9% (within 10% cap, plus ~3 SVD).
